visual_intent: clean negative space for later kinetic typography
brand_guardrails: keep the mood premium and calm
composition: clear top and bottom text-safe zones
reference_strategy: Use the first anchor for breathing room and the second for steel-blue morning tonality. Keep continuity with the rebuilt March 25 reel through the same woman, same quiet workspace family, same wardrobe family, and same morning light direction.
variation_guardrails: do not reuse an exact pose from the references
keep the background simpler than the anchors
preserve continuity with later shots through wardrobe, palette, and light direction

text_overlay.font_reference: Noto Sans JP or closest available sans-serif for Japanese

sora_handoff.shot_goal: Open the reel with a relatable premium busy-morning beat.
sora_handoff.subject_motion: Small breath, soft blink, tiny hand movement near the desk.
sora_handoff.transition_out: Hold the last frame cleanly for a straight cut.
sora_handoff.prompt: Animate this vertical source image into a calm premium reel opening. Keep the same subject identity, wardrobe, environment, and soft steel-blue morning light. Use only subtle natural motion: a small breath, a soft blink, and a gentle hand movement. Add a very slow push-in. Do not add new people, props, or dramatic movement. Preserve generous text-safe negative space.

notes: Shot 01 of the rebuilt March 25 reel set. Generate as PNG. Keep it premium, calm, and more editorial than the older version.
